revision.comment: module documentation fixed. If you encounter issues, best to report them next time
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia categories
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "==" to " [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] "
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 2 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}↵" to ""
revision.text:
==Old Content== ==Old Content== ==Old Content== {{Non-English-language text category}}
See also
*{{Template link with parameters|PIE|text in Proto-Indo-European language here}} [[en:Articles containing Proto-Indo-European-language text]]
[[en:Category:Articles containing Proto-Indo-European-language text]] [[en:Category:Articles containing Proto-Indo-European-language text]] [[Category:Articles with text in Indo-European languages]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q125431642)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q125431642)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Non-English-language text category}} {{Template link with parameters|PIE|text in Proto-Indo-European language here}} {{wikidata link|Q125431642}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Articles containing Proto-Indo-European-language text]] [[en:Category:Articles containing Proto-Indo-European-language text]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Articles with text in Indo-European languages]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

<!--templates--> {{Non-English-language text category}} {{Template link with parameters|PIE|text in Proto-Indo-European language here}} {{wikidata link|Q125431642}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Articles containing Proto-Indo-European-language text]] [[en:Category:Articles containing Proto-Indo-European-language text]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Articles with text in Indo-European languages]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]]

<!--templates--> {{Non-English-language text category}} {{Template link with parameters|PIE|text in Proto-Indo-European language here}} {{wikidata link|Q125431642}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Articles containing Proto-Indo-European-language text]] [[en:Category:Articles containing Proto-Indo-European-language text]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Articles with text in Indo-European languages]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]]

<!--templates--> {{Non-English-language text category}} {{Template link with parameters|PIE|text in Proto-Indo-European language here}} {{wikidata link|Q125431642}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Articles containing Proto-Indo-European-language text]] [[en:Category:Articles containing Proto-Indo-European-language text]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Articles with text in Indo-European languages]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:articles with]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] (crud category cleanup) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22556809750|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

{{Non-English-language text category}}

<!--interwikis-->

[[en:Category:Articles containing Proto-Indo-European-language text]]
<!--categories-->

[[Category:Tier 1 Categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:articles with]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 2 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template (has duplicate-language pairs) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25518276466|time triggered pipeline]]
